source: bezier-tokens/src/global/font.json (canonical Bezier DS) + live channel.io DOM (CDP 2026-05-14)

live_observed_resolutions.body_text_117_of_118_samples: Inter, "Inter Fallback", NotoSansKR, "NotoSansKR Fallback", NotoSansJP, "NotoSansJP Fallback", ...

notes: Bezier DS product chrome ships Inter as primary across KR/JP locales — never a Korean-only stack; locale only flips which Noto family wins ties.
BildV5 appeared on exactly 1 of 118 sampled elements in marketing chrome — treat as a marketing-only display face, not a product token.
No 'Channel Sans' or proprietary face was found in the Bezier source or the live DOM as of 2026-05-14.
